objective: Deliver a submission-ready, demo-ready AutoStream agent by auditing, fixing, validating, and documenting the existing deterministic workflow without unnecessary refactors.

project_context.goal: Conversational AI workflow for pricing/features Q&A, deterministic intent routing, multi-turn memory, and gated lead capture.
design_principles: Deterministic logic first; optional LLM fallback only if explicitly needed
Use local KB as the source of truth for product/policy facts
Minimize code churn and preserve architecture intent
Prefer targeted fixes over broad rewrites

hard_constraints: Do not rewrite the whole project unless required by a blocking defect.
Do not add dependencies unless strictly necessary.
Do not use runtime web search.
Do not answer product/pricing/policy facts from model memory when local KB exists.
Do not call lead capture until name, email, and platform are all present and valid.
Do not ask for extra PII beyond required lead fields.
Do not lose state across turns or between lead-slot prompts.
Do not break existing tests or documented demo flow.

behavior: KB answers are deterministic, precise, and non-hallucinated
Lead flow asks one missing slot at a time
Lead capture executes exactly once after all slots are complete
quality: requirements files are minimal and accurate
robustness: No unsafe logging of sensitive user data

execution_strategy.rule: Work in small safe phases: inspect -> diagnose -> patch -> test -> validate -> summarize.
change_policy: Add concise comments only where logic is non-obvious

workflow.name: Audit and baseline
tasks: Map entrypoints and flow in agent/orchestration code
Cross-check imports and requirements for mismatches
Identify failing tests, runtime errors, and behavior gaps

workflow.name: Core behavior verification
tasks: Validate intent classifier outcomes for core scenarios
Validate RAG retrieval and response formatting from local KB only
Validate state persistence and slot carry-over across turns

workflow.name: Targeted fixes
tasks: Fix logic bugs and edge cases with minimal edits
Fix validation and session handling issues

workflow.name: Test and verify
tasks: Add only essential missing tests for uncovered critical behavior
Verify exact-once lead capture and no premature tool call
Verify pricing/policy responses remain KB-grounded and exact

workflow.name: Submission polish
tasks: Confirm requirements files are accurate and minimal
Generate concise readiness report with remaining risks

rag: Pricing and policy values remain exact
lead_flow: Prompts one missing field at a time
Collects required fields only: name, email, platform
Invokes lead capture exactly once when complete
memory: Collected lead fields persist until completion
security: Invalid or malicious session identifiers are rejected
No sensitive value leakage in logs

required_output: Final readiness verdict with known limitations

response_style.format: small actionable steps with minimal noise
response_style.rule: analyze before editing; validate after each meaningful change
